reason: Browser automation feature successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and returned it to the user.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully with "Gamut" title and agent sidebar visible
Step 2: Found and clicked on "QA-20260708-194342-8hfs" agent in the sidebar - Agent page opened successfully, displaying chat interface

Step 3: Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Browser Page Title Lookup" was created
Step 4: Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent completed the task in 17 seconds and returned the result with "idle" status

Step 5: Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot - Response clearly shows "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." confirming successful browser navigation and page title retrieval
